purpose: Choose the next H-A2 research path after the 2022-10 coarse stress review without treating SPY 1-minute bars as the hypothesis.
research_question: Before seeking another exact 2022 SPY bar source, can a lower-resolution proxy test weaken, falsify, or prioritize the H-A2 macro-conditioned ORB mechanism using already-available local data?

rationale.h_a2_10_result: October 2022 has useful stress/regime context but no exact ORB entry/exit evidence.
wiki_basis: SPY 0DTE ORB source uses the 9:30-9:35 ET opening range and should be treated as a hypothesis generator until real option-chain validation exists.
Backtest validation protocol requires decision-timestamp observability, chronological splits, costs, big-day dependency checks, MinTRL/PSR/DSR where applicable, and clear evidence labels.
rationale.resolution_principle: Use the coarsest data resolution that can answer the current evidence-tier question. Exact SPY 1-minute bars are required for exact ORB evidence, not for every H-A2 mechanism check.

lower_resolution_proxy_first.allowed_next_artifact: A separate H-A2 lower-resolution proxy-test preregistration.
allowed_inputs: existing local SPY intraday bars from 2023-2024, possibly downsampled to 5-minute or 15-minute bars
existing option quote summaries and implementable PnL artifacts where already available
lower_resolution_proxy_first.allowed_claim: The H-A2 mechanism is weakened, falsified at proxy level, or prioritized for exact-data work.
forbidden_claims: Do not claim exact 2022-10 ORB entries/exits were tested.
Do not claim deployable strategy edge.
Do not approve paper trading or operational validation.
Do not treat proxy PnL as implementable exact ORB PnL unless exact quote/fill logic is used.

blocked_until: lower-resolution proxy work cannot weaken or prioritize H-A2
the next pre-registration proves exact 2022-10 ORB timing is the minimum resolution required
local TWS/Gateway is listening if IBKR remains the chosen no-paid source
user approves any new paid provider or paid source
forbidden_now: Do not request IBKR historical bars from H-A2.10 alone.
Do not buy more 2022 option data before the underlying-bar question is re-justified.
Do not introduce a new paid provider without explicit user approval.
